about: I'm a passionate Software Engineer specializing in front-end development with experience across the full software stack. I thrive in both collaborative, cross-functional teams as well as independent settings, with a strong grasp of the development lifecycle and agile methodologies. My priority is delivering quality, user-focused solutions and fresh, innovative experiences. I'm always eager to expand my skills and learn new technologies.

experience.title: Software Engineer
items: Software engineer for mPulse's portals division (formerly HealthTrio). Built and maintained responsive web and mobile UIs personalized for dozens of the largest healthcare clients in the US.

Primarily worked as a UI engineer for the web app, mPulse/HealthTrio's largest product. Developed new features for their web portal, including X12 transaction forms. Worked to update over twenty year old legacy architecture to modern standards and technologies. Maintained style contistency and handled rebranding efforts across over fifty brands.

Later worked as lead front-end mobile engineer for the portals mobile app. Maintained functional and stylistic parity between mobile and web apps. Worked to seamlessly integrate web views into the mobile app experience.

experience.title: Data Wrangler & AR Developer
items: Worked in the Real-time Interactive group at renowned commercial & game content studio Psyop's LA division.

Data wrangler for mocap data on a AAA video game project. Attended mocap shoots and processed all data for use in animation, client review, and Unreal development. AR developer on various proof-of-concepts using Unity, 8th Wall, and ARKit.

experience.title: Software Developer
items: Front-end lead on the patient app for Telus Health's PharmaConnect. Worked onsite at Telus Health's headquarters as primary liaison for implementation.
DevOps lead launching a new eCommerce website. Set up and maintained a CD pipeline using GitHub and AWS. Researched and integrated headless eCommerce platforms.

personal.name: TETRA
personal.description: Audio visualizer dynamically animated in pure CSS. An exercise in doing nontrivial math using only CSS.

personal.name: ADALIN
personal.description: AI agent designed to read and process custom wikis. Integrates with Discord to answer natural language questions through text or speech recognition.

education.minors: Minored in Game Design & Development, Woman & Gender Studies
